reviews.review_description: One of my favorites on Go!! So much action, so much fun!! I even broke a sweat playing this game!! Great job!! 👍

reviews.review_title: Like Smash Hit but with movement
reviews.review_description: I have no idea why another reviewer said you can't move side to side. You use your head to tilt and move side to side, and that is a lot of the fun because you can actually move at pretty extreme angles and it's very responsive. So you're moving side to side with your head and shooting at the same time, in an environment that is very dynamic and fast paced with a lot of color and fun music. I have always been a big fan of smash hit, this is like that game except with the added challenge of moving around to dodge a lot of things which you can't actually shoot. This game is not easy, but it really is a great deal of fun and highly recommended.  The loading text stays on in the lobby before you enter a level, which confused me. Other than that didn't see any flaws, very well done

reviews.review_title: Lack of instruction is a fail
reviews.review_description: You jump right into the game, even though it says “loading” forever. Kept losing because of hitting walls and other crap until I left the game and read the review about tilting your head to move, which makes sense now but definitely wasn’t an initial thought when I was playing, but I’ll be honest and say I haven’t tried it since I read it. Could be better, could be worse.

I think that this game is stupid because I can’t play it because it keeps saying that my oculus needs to update when I repeatedly try to 
update it.
Large time waisted
